design_philosophy: A premium, transparent marketplace for Bharat creators. We use high-contrast data visualization to build trust. No generic SaaS aesthetics. The creator is the hero, and data (engagement, pricing) is the truth.

surfaces.card_dashboard: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-xl p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
surfaces.card_creator: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-[#E84A27] transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#E84A27] text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-none font-semibold hover:bg-[#C83E1D] transition-colors flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] px-6 py-3 rounded-none font-semibold hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white transition-colors flex items-center justify-center
buttons.outline: bg-white border-2 border-[#E84A27] text-[#E84A27] px-6 py-3 rounded-none font-semibold hover:bg-[#E84A27] hover:text-white transition-colors

filters.container: w-full md:w-72 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-[#E5E5E5] pr-6
filters.accordion: Use Shadcn Accordion. Customize with pure black text, sharp borders.
filters.checkbox: Use Shadcn Checkbox. Focus ring should be #E84A27.

data_visualization.guideline: Use large typography for metrics. 'Engagement Rate: 8.4%' should have '8.4%' in text-4xl Cabinet Grotesk. Use Recharts for ROI tracking lines.

badges.verified: bg-[#1A4331]/10 text-[#1A4331] px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1
badges.category: bg-[#F7F5F2] border border-[#E5E5E5] text-[#525252] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have visible hover states. Elevate cards slightly (-translate-y-1).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion for staggered fade-in up on lists (like creator search results).
motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling on marketing pages.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio against background. Brand primary #E84A27 is high contrast on white.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All buttons, links, inputs, and major UI nodes MUST have `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid="brand-login-button"`).

icons_and_assets.icon_library: lucide-react for functional UI, @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone) for marketing sections.

specific_page_instructions.landing_page: Hero section must use massive typography (Cabinet Grotesk) explaining the 'Transparent Influencer Marketplace' USP. Use bento-style feature blocks for 'Rate Card Transparency' and 'Verified Performance'. Do not use pure white background, use #F7F5F2.
specific_page_instructions.search_discovery: Sidebar left for 24+ filters. Main area uses Mode B 'Control Room' grid for creator cards. Each card must prominently display the creator's Rate Card, Engagement Score, and Top % Badge.
specific_page_instructions.creator_profile: Split layout. Left: Sticky creator photo + quick actions (Collab/Connect). Right: Deep dive into performance data, past brands, and detailed rate card. Use #1A4331 for positive ROI metrics.
specific_page_instructions.dashboards: Strict Mode B 'Control Room' grids. Dense data. Use Shadcn components for tables and lists, keeping borders sharp (#E5E5E5) and avoiding heavy card shadows unless hovered.

development_rules.framework: React (.js, not .tsx), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI primitives.
development_rules.routing: Ensure Google OAuth and Email/Password auth flows have dedicated, styled pages that match the brand archetype.
